task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenMRS dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Access the patient record for Bobby Tables or Martha Tables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient chart or dashboard for 'Bobby Tables' or 'Martha Tables' is displayed.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the relationships or family management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, widget, or page specifically for viewing and editing patient relationships is visible.
The relationships list no longer shows 'Sibling' between Bobby and Martha, or there is visual evidence of the agent deleting/voiding the Sibling relationship.

The relationships list shows Martha Tables as 'Parent' (if viewing Bobby's chart) or Bobby Tables as 'Child' (if viewing Martha's chart), or a form is being successfully submitted with these exact roles.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenMRS web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser window showing the OpenMRS UI is used for all actions. No terminal windows with curl, API requests, or database commands are used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the relationship
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Elements tab, Console) are not open and being used to alter the text on the page to say 'Parent' or 'Child'.

integrity.description: The relationship update was performed through standard OpenMRS UI forms
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with the actual 'Add Relationship' or 'Edit Relationship' forms, dropdowns, and save buttons within the OpenMRS application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Child patient name: Bobby Tables. Parent patient name: Martha Tables. The agent must remove the incorrect 'Sibling' relationship and create a 'Parent/Child' relationship where Martha is explicitly set as the Parent and Bobby is set as the Child.
